Full-Stack Developer
Vantage SaaS — Hybrid (Tel Aviv / Remote)

About Vantage SaaS
Vantage SaaS is a B2B analytics platform helping e-commerce businesses understand their customer data. We build data-rich dashboards, reporting tools, and API integrations for 300+ clients. Our engineering team is 25 people and growing.

About the Role
We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to join our product team. You will build new features across the entire stack — from React UI components to Node.js API services to PostgreSQL schemas. You will work closely with product and design to ship features that directly impact our customers.

Responsibilities
- Design and implement React components and pages for our client-facing analytics dashboards
- Build and maintain REST APIs in Node.js/TypeScript for data querying, aggregation, and client integrations
- Design PostgreSQL schemas and write optimized queries for large datasets
- Collaborate with the data team to integrate external data sources and client webhook events
- Own features end-to-end: from technical design through testing and production deployment
- Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions
- Write unit and integration tests; maintain test coverage above 80%
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to engineering standards
- Containerize services with Docker for consistent development and staging environments

Requirements
- 3+ years of full-stack development experience
- Strong proficiency with React (hooks, context, component design patterns)
- Strong proficiency with Node.js and TypeScript for backend API development
- Solid understanding of PostgreSQL: schema design, query optimization, indexing strategies
- Experience designing and consuming REST APIs
- Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions preferred)
- Experience with Docker for local development and containerization
- Familiarity with AWS services (S3, EC2, or similar)
- Strong understanding of TypeScript across both frontend and backend
- Experience writing tests with Jest or a similar framework

Nice to Have
- Experience with Redis for caching
- Exposure to data pipeline work (ETL, webhooks, CSV processing)
- Experience with reporting or dashboard-building features
- Familiarity with charting libraries (Chart.js, D3, Recharts)

Compensation
$110,000–$140,000 base salary + equity + benefits
